title.en: So, he didn't need to care about Taikoo Shan's ...

content.en:
Practice!

Ye Tian's task was to raise his cultivation level, otherwise he would not be able to rise to the threat of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor.

As for Taigu Mountain, it shouldn't be possible to deal with him with the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, this must be the behavior of the Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor himself.

So, he didn't need to care about Taikoo Shan's behavior.

"It's best to join a force that is strong enough to compete with Taikoo Mountain!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the past, he didn't care about joining the cultivator force, because he felt that it would not help him much, but now he felt that if there was a force as a backer, at least Taigu Mountain would not move him.

Even, after he killed the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor in the future, Taigu Mountain would not attack him.

However, Taikoo Mountain is a top hegemon-level force, and there are not many forces that can match Taikoo Mountain.

Moreover, he was afraid that such a force would covet his secrets, so he had to be cautious and cautious when joining such a hegemon-level force.

"Let's wait until we break through to the eighth blood transformation realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After that, he refined drops of golden substance into his heart, and continued to refine the heart of the seven blood transformation realms, making the heart stronger and stronger.

The rest of the Terran race didn't panic, after all, they had resources, and they could continue to cultivate.

this day.

Ye Xingchen's cultivation broke through to the four Blood Transformation Realms, and this was also thanks to the benefits he had obtained from the Ancient Golden Tablet, so he could break through to the Four Blood Transformation Realms so quickly.

Time flies.

Ye Tian's heart was getting stronger and stronger, and he was getting closer and closer to the limit of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm.

And the outside world.

Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was in a very bad mood, he couldn't find Endless Heavenly Ancestor.

"Damn, no one even knows where the Endless Heavenly Ancestor came from?"

Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor was annoyed.

He knew that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor must be hiding somewhere to cultivate, and if he let the Endless Heavenly Ancestor cultivate to break through to the Eight Blood Transformation Realm, he would not be an opponent.

Therefore, he wanted to find and kill the Endless Heavenly Ancestor before he could break through through his cultivation.

It's been a long time.

this day.

Ye Tian's heart was finally tempered to the extreme of the Seven Blood Transformation Realms, and he encountered a bottleneck again.

"Continue to use the previous method to enter the Mia Bitter Sea, fight against a group of Void Demon Worms, and break the bottleneck through endless battles!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently.

A copy of Ye Tian's body sneaked into Mia's bitter sea, and then entered Mia's bitter sea.

Next, he fights a group of Void Demon Worms.

Fight after battle, fall again and again.

But Ye Tian was not afraid of replicating the wear and tear of his body, and he kept fighting like this, he didn't believe that he couldn't break the shackles.

In many life-and-death battles, Ye Tian's shackles were finally broken.

Click!

As the shackles cracked, Ye Tian immediately used the golden substance given by the Ancient Golden Tablet to impact the Eight Blood Transformation Realm cultivations.

Soon.

Rumble!!!!

The bottleneck is broken and the heart begins to metamorphose, which then promotes the eighth blood transformation of the immeasurable blood.

All the time, Ye Tian's cultivation strength was skyrocketing.

After a period of time, Ye Tian finally stepped into the eighth blood transformation realm.

"With my current strength, the Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor is no longer my opponent! However, it is still a little difficult to kill the Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor. Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor should be infinitely close to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, there must be a lot of hole cards, and it is not easy to kill him!"

Ye Tian felt that if he made a move, he would directly kill the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, otherwise after the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor ran away, if he didn't come out of Taigu Mountain, he wouldn't be able to kill the other party.

After the breakthrough in cultivation, Ye Tian thought about joining a certain force first.

"Ask about Hayes Heavenly Ancestor!"

He felt that Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was still more reliable, so he asked his opinion.

Soon, he contacted Hays Heavenly Ancestor.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, are you alright?"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor asked.

"I'm fine!" Ye Tian asked directly: "Hayes Heavenly Ancestor, if I join the top overlord-level forces, what forces are suitable to join, and I will not be subject to suspicion and other problems." "

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor knew that Ye Tian really didn't have any background behind him, so he wanted to find a backer, so he proposed: "If you want to find a force to join, the most suitable one is undoubtedly the top overlord-level force Dark Sea." This force, any blood transformation realm, does not care about the origin, the only requirement is that the strength is strong, the potential is enough, and it has to pass their many mission requirements. Of course, for boundary-breaking geniuses and primeval-level geniuses, the Dark Sea definitely wants it. You have passed the fifth assessment of the Ancient Golden Tablet, if you choose to join the Dark Sea, the Dark Sea will definitely want it!"

Afterwards, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor talked about the situation in the Dark Sea.

After Ye Tian pondered it, he also decided to join the Dark Sea first and seek the blessing of the Dark Sea.

And the Hays Heavenly Ancestor happened to have the contact information of an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Dark Sea, and handed over the contact information to Ye Tian.

......

Dark Sea.

Xuanye Heavenly Ancestor was cultivating when he suddenly received a summons from a strange Heavenly Ancestor.

After he communicated with the other party, he found out that it was the Endless Heavenly Ancestor who had become famous recently.

Knowing that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor wanted to join the Dark Sea, he immediately went to find the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor.

The Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor was a Ninth Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Level powerhouse of the Dark Sea, and one of the five giants of the Dark Sea.

Soon, he came to the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor.

"Lord Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, Endless Heavenly Ancestor contacted me and said that he wanted to join our Dark Sea!" Xuanye Heavenly Ancestor said.

"What, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor wants to join us in the Dark Sea!"

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor is overjoyed, this is a good thing!

He had also heard that the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was chasing and killing the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, and he was still thinking about winning over the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, but he didn't expect the Endless Heavenly Ancestor to join them in the Dark Sea so soon.

Although the origin of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is unknown, he doesn't know how to become an ancient-level genius.

However, the Dark Sea doesn't ask about this, as long as they are willing to join, they want it.

As a result, the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor was ready to personally go to the Endless Heavenly Ancestor.

Subsequently, the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor contacted Ye Tian, and after knowing Ye Tian's location, he immediately set off.

......

Breach of territorial waters, in some small fragment.

Ye Tian was waiting for the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor here.

Soon, the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor came.

"I've seen the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor!" Ye Tian said politely.

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor took a look at Ye Tian and found that Ye Tian's cultivation had actually broken through to the Eight Blood Transformation Realm, and this strength was enough to rank among the top ten in the Dark Sea!

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor is polite, let's go, let's go to the Dark Sea first!"

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian followed the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor to the Dark Sea.

In a short time, they came to the Dark Sea.

And at this time, there were already many Heavenly Ancestors of the Dark Sea who came out, just to meet Ye Tian, an ancient-level genius.
